blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
